posts.author: alimongelli (AJ Limongelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Request to be able to mark-up or add text to photos taken via Mobile App.

What are you trying to achieve

Hello! I am submitting a request to be able to mark-up or add text to photos taken via Mobile App. This ability would ideally be available immediately after taking a photo and before submitting to the corresponding column, etc.

The idea would be to eliminate having to alter or add text to an image outside of the native Monday.com functionality for better efficiency.

Thank you for the consideration!
